leadership.title: Organizer & Judge — Prompt Battle Contest 2024 (First Ever at DIU)
leadership.org: DIU Computer & Programming Club (DIU-CPC)
leadership.body: Designed problem statements, evaluated innovative prompts, and oversaw the first-ever Prompt Battle Contest at DIU.

leadership.title: Problem Setter — Datathon Contest Fall 2024
leadership.body: Designed ML challenge problems for the Kaggle-hosted Datathon.

leadership.title: Judge — Idea Poster Presentation, DIU Data Science Summit 2024
leadership.body: Evaluated innovative AI and automation ideas from students at the Data Science Summit.
